name: Piippo Oyj
summary: Piippo Oyj manufactures and sells baling net wraps and baling twines for farmers in Finland and internationally. The company also offers baling films; B2B products that include cable fillers and armouring yarns; and consumer products, such as synthetic ropes and twines, rolleri, natural ropes and twines, railing and decorative ropes, products for household use, towing ropes, binding straps, starting ropes, and short and long link chains. Piippo Oyj was founded in 1942 and is based in Outokumpu, Finland.
